displayTitle: The Misadventures of Triple-Zero And Beetee
synopsis: "The Misadventures of Triple-Zero and Beetee" is a canon comic short story published in Darth Vader 20 as a bonus story. It is written by Kieron Gillen and follows the characters 0-0-0 and BT-1.
title: The Misadventures of Triple-Zero And Beetee
